groups.heading: Active release
groups.description: The current release boundary. Work here must close before the next major is tagged; every item accumulates the proof established by the completed foundations below.

groups.heading: Independent and physical proofs
groups.description: Evidence that cannot be synthesized honestly by a single local checkout: it needs a second GitHub identity, an external consumer, or a manufactured object. These are durable trust obligations, not pretend software versions.

groups.heading: Deferred horizons
groups.description: Deliberately unscheduled work that follows a mature v2 single-book contract or a future decision to assume substantially more product and operational responsibility.

groups.heading: Completed foundations
groups.description: Closed release milestones in natural version order. They remain linked to their shipped issues and releases so the accumulated-trust history is recoverable.

milestones.title: v2.0 — Composable press
milestones.description: The active breaking release: versioned print/design profiles (#172), deterministic extension registration (#173), migration and rollback proof (#174), and semantic chapter openings (#192), with every correctness and public-trust gate found by audit five. The release-blocking P0s are protected repository/tag rules (#153), v1-to-v2 migration acceptance (#174), and immutable container/Python dependency identities (#194). Public web and print proof remains in #158, #189, #190, and #195; maintainability/test-harness work is #197-#202; read-only identifier lookup is #203. Milestone: https://github.com/clintecker/press/milestone/4. Audit-five ledger: https://github.com/clintecker/press/issues?q=is%3Aissue%20is%3Aopen%20label%3Aaudit-5%20milestone%3A%22v2.0%20%E2%80%94%20Composable%20press%22. Unreleased record: https://github.com/clintecker/press/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md. Versioning contract: https://github.com/clintecker/press/blob/main/docs/ARCHITECTURE.md. Migration guide: https://github.com/clintecker/press/blob/main/docs/MIGRATION.md. Independent and physical proof continues in https://github.com/clintecker/press/milestone/13.

milestones.title: Delivery trust — live proofs
milestones.description: Independent evidence that cannot be honestly generated by the repository owner alone: a fork pull request and private cross-organization book consuming the public action/toolchain (#87), plus one explicitly capped manufactured golden copy whose bytes and physical inspection bind back to the release receipt (#143). Milestone: https://github.com/clintecker/press/milestone/13. Same-owner automated boundary foundation: https://github.com/clintecker/press/issues/37. Public toolchain boundary: https://github.com/clintecker/press/issues/161. Direct-ordering plan: https://github.com/clintecker/press/blob/main/docs/DIRECT-ORDERING-PLAN.md. Release trust chain: https://github.com/clintecker/press/blob/main/docs/INVARIANTS.md.

milestones.title: Later — Multi-book catalog
milestones.description: Optional multi-book catalog, intentionally unscheduled until the composable v2 single-book contract is released and proven. Scope: https://github.com/clintecker/press/issues/6. Milestone: https://github.com/clintecker/press/milestone/5. Active predecessor: https://github.com/clintecker/press/milestone/4. Architecture and artifact laws: https://github.com/clintecker/press/blob/main/docs/ARCHITECTURE.md. Roadmap source: https://github.com/clintecker/press/blob/main/roadmap/milestones.json.

milestones.title: Custom merchant of record (deferred)
milestones.description: Custom merchant-of-record commerce machinery, built only if the publisher intentionally assumes payment, tax, privacy, fraud, refund, support, and fulfillment responsibility instead of the current provider seller-of-record model. Scope covers the broker, payment/provider adapters, state machines, verified webhooks, exactly-once outbox, reconciliation, privacy, operator controls, observability, sandbox proof, and incident operations. Milestone/issues: https://github.com/clintecker/press/milestone/14. Plan: https://github.com/clintecker/press/blob/main/docs/DIRECT-ORDERING-PLAN.md. Current seller-of-record guide: https://github.com/clintecker/press/blob/main/docs/PRINT-ORDERING.md. Active v2 predecessor: https://github.com/clintecker/press/milestone/4. This backlog records scope without authorizing or scheduling it.

milestones.title: v1.1.1 — Integrity hotfix
milestones.description: Historical integrity hotfix for correctness and release-safety failures where a command could succeed while public output was wrong or unsafe. Release: https://github.com/clintecker/press/releases/tag/v1.1.1. Closed scope: https://github.com/clintecker/press/milestone/1. Changelog: https://github.com/clintecker/press/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md. Architecture: https://github.com/clintecker/press/blob/main/docs/ARCHITECTURE.md.

milestones.title: v1.2 — Executable contracts
milestones.description: Historical executable-contract release: centralized configuration/artifact contracts, stronger verifiers, and real consumer-book integration. Release: https://github.com/clintecker/press/releases/tag/v1.2.0. Closed scope: https://github.com/clintecker/press/milestone/2. Architecture: https://github.com/clintecker/press/blob/main/docs/ARCHITECTURE.md. Artifact reference: https://github.com/clintecker/press/blob/main/docs/REFERENCE.md.

milestones.title: v1.3 — Public readiness
milestones.description: Historical public-readiness release: licensing, installation, support/security guidance, portability, and repository-boundary evidence. Release: https://github.com/clintecker/press/releases/tag/v1.3.0. Closed scope: https://github.com/clintecker/press/milestone/3. Installation: https://github.com/clintecker/press/blob/main/docs/INSTALL.md. Contribution policy: https://github.com/clintecker/press/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md. Remaining independent proof: https://github.com/clintecker/press/issues/87.

milestones.title: v1.10 — Boundary integrity
milestones.description: Completed boundary-integrity release: source/publication safety, archive/format verification, retail artifacts, workflow containment, toolchain identity, and resumable releases. Release: https://github.com/clintecker/press/releases/tag/v1.10.0. Closed scope: https://github.com/clintecker/press/milestone/6. Architecture: https://github.com/clintecker/press/blob/main/docs/ARCHITECTURE.md.

milestones.title: v1.11 — Workflow coherence
milestones.description: Completed workflow/public-contract release: durable editorial and research outcomes, domain-neutral instruments, aesthetic/config documentation, contributor guidance, package metadata, and complexity reduction. Release: https://github.com/clintecker/press/releases/tag/v1.11.0. Closed scope: https://github.com/clintecker/press/milestone/7. Contributor contract: https://github.com/clintecker/press/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md.

milestones.title: v1.12 — Trust foundations
milestones.description: Completed accumulated-trust foundation: executable invariant/callable ledgers, collection gates, typed deterministic adapters, composable factories, fixture provenance, property tests, and bounded replayable fuzzing. Release: https://github.com/clintecker/press/releases/tag/v1.12.0. Closed scope: https://github.com/clintecker/press/milestone/8. Invariants: https://github.com/clintecker/press/blob/main/docs/INVARIANTS.md. Testing: https://github.com/clintecker/press/blob/main/docs/TESTING.md.

milestones.title: v1.13 — Adversarial artifact proof
milestones.description: Completed adversarial proof: named damage operators, fixture-specific diagnostics, state models, high-risk scenarios, real-tool integrations, compatibility, and design-major visual regression. Release: https://github.com/clintecker/press/releases/tag/v1.13.0. Closed scope: https://github.com/clintecker/press/milestone/9. Damage harness: https://github.com/clintecker/press/issues/88. Real-tool runner: https://github.com/clintecker/press/issues/91.

milestones.title: v1.15 — Operator desk
milestones.description: Completed operator-desk release: typed command catalog, receipt-backed artifact status, typed doctor findings, versioned child events, deterministic control, headless active-signal tests, installed-wheel proof, and public documentation. Release: https://github.com/clintecker/press/releases/tag/v1.15.0. Closed scope: https://github.com/clintecker/press/milestone/11. Durable plan: https://github.com/clintecker/press/blob/main/docs/TUI-PLAN.md. Architecture: https://github.com/clintecker/press/blob/main/docs/ARCHITECTURE.md.

milestones.title: v1.15.2 — Delivery trust completion
milestones.description: Completed delivery-trust release: layered CI, contiguous accumulated-trust receipts (#94/#97), deterministic mutation-score ratchet (#95), and per-module branch-coverage floors (#96), including independently emitted per-job receipt assembly (#150). Release: https://github.com/clintecker/press/releases/tag/v1.15.2. Closed scope: https://github.com/clintecker/press/milestone/10. Remaining second-party/physical proofs: https://github.com/clintecker/press/milestone/13.

milestones.title: v1.16 — Direct print ordering
milestones.description: Completed seller-of-record direct-print-ordering release: edition manifests, provider qualification data, accessible storefront calls to action with no-JavaScript fallback, provider-hosted checkout, publisher policy pages, documentation, and release gates without publisher payment infrastructure. Latest patch: https://github.com/clintecker/press/releases/tag/v1.16.4. Closed scope: https://github.com/clintecker/press/milestone/12. Plan: https://github.com/clintecker/press/blob/main/docs/DIRECT-ORDERING-PLAN.md. Guide: https://github.com/clintecker/press/blob/main/docs/PRINT-ORDERING.md. Remaining physical golden-copy proof: https://github.com/clintecker/press/issues/143.

milestones.title: v1.18 — Public experience and adoption
milestones.description: Completed public-experience release: beginner onboarding, validated configuration UI, conventional CLI discovery, accessible/semantic documentation and reader surfaces, public CI/toolchain consumption, and contributor/discovery governance. Release: https://github.com/clintecker/press/releases/tag/v1.18.0. Closed scope: https://github.com/clintecker/press/milestone/15. Public site: https://clintecker.github.io/press/. Residual reader metadata and gallery render proof moved to https://github.com/clintecker/press/milestone/4 as #158 and #190.

milestones.title: v1.19 — Maintenance and compatibility
milestones.description: Completed maintenance/compatibility release: contributor verification, print-safe interiors, registrations and printing guides, security controls, Python 3.14 qualification, warning-clean dependency compatibility, hook isolation, and supported Action pins. Latest patch: https://github.com/clintecker/press/releases/tag/v1.19.1. Closed scope: https://github.com/clintecker/press/milestone/16. Compatibility: https://github.com/clintecker/press/blob/main/docs/COMPATIBILITY.md. Registrations delivery: https://github.com/clintecker/press/issues/191. Optional read-only lookup moved to https://github.com/clintecker/press/issues/203.
